title: org.apache.hadoop.mapreduce.lib.db
description: This package provides the DBInputFormat, DBOutputFormat, and DBRecordReader classes, which are used to read and write data from/to a database using the MapReduce framework. The DBInputFormat class is an InputFormat that reads input data from an SQL table, while the DBOutputFormat class is an OutputFormat that sends the reduce output to a SQL table. The DBRecordReader class is a RecordReader that reads records from a SQL table. The package also includes the DBSplitter interface, which is used to generate DBInputSplits to use with DataDrivenDBInputFormat. The package provides splitters for various data types, such as BigDecimal, Boolean, Date, Float, Integer, and Text. The package also includes the DBWritable interface, which is used to write objects to and read objects from a database. The package provides implementations of DBWritable for various data types, such as BooleanWritable, FloatWritable, IntWritable, and Text. The package also includes the DataDrivenDBInputFormat class, which is a subclass of DBInputFormat that implements a custom algorithm for dividing a database table into splits. The package also includes the DataDrivenDBRecordReader class, which is a subclass of DBRecordReader that reads records from a SQL table using data-driven WHERE clause splits. The package also includes the MySQLDBRecordReader and MySQLDataDrivenDBRecordReader classes, which are subclasses of DBRecordReader that read records from a MySQL database. The package also includes the OracleDBRecordReader and OracleDataDrivenDBRecordReader classes, which are subclasses of DBRecordReader that read records from an Oracle database. The package also includes the OracleDateSplitter class, which is a subclass of DBSplitter that implements DBSplitter over date/time values returned by an Oracle database. The package also includes the TextSplitter class, which is a subclass of DBSplitter that implements DBSplitter over text strings.
